radiatR 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Camera Calibration Workflow
    • Working with Loaders

    Utilities for persisting calibration correspondences

    calibration_points_helpers.Rd

    These helpers convert calibration correspondences between list and tabular forms, persist them to disk, and compute camera calibration results using saved points.

    calibration_points_tibble(image_points)

calibration_points_from_tibble(tbl)

write_calibration_points(image_points, path)

read_calibration_points(path)

calibration_from_points(
  board_dims,
  square_size,
  image_points,
  origin = c(0, 0),
  order = c("row_major", "col_major"),
  quiet = FALSE
)

    Arguments

    image_points

    Calibration correspondences provided as a list of 2-column matrices, a data frame, or a CSV path (where supported).

    tbl

    Data frame with columns frame, x, and y (and optionally corner).

    path

    File path for reading or writing calibration correspondence data (CSV format).

    board_dims

    Checkerboard dimensions supplied to checkerboard_points().

    square_size

    Spacing between adjacent corners in world units.

    origin

    World coordinate assigned to the corner at row 0, column 0.

    order

    Traversal order of the corners.

    quiet

    Suppress informational output.

    Value

    calibration_points_tibble() returns a data frame describing the image points. calibration_points_from_tibble() and read_calibration_points() return a list of matrices usable by calibration_session(). write_calibration_points() invisibly returns path. calibration_from_points() returns a structure matching the output of calibration_session() but without the interactive capture step.

    Contents

    Developed by John D. Kirwan.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
